operations.title: Node Efficiency Monitoring
operations.summary: Continuous monitoring of node energy, throughput, and hardware utilization with threshold-based alerts.

operations.summary: Build and release pipelines optimized for minimal rebuilds, smaller artifacts, and greener hosting choices.

greenInfrastructure.title: Low-Power Service Mesh
greenInfrastructure.summary: Service mesh design targeting reduced idle power draw and adaptive scaling for civic workloads with variable demand.
